chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so let's take an example of a 3d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: let's take an example of a 3d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: for that let's create an array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: np.array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so let's create a 3d array of size 2x2x3

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so basically we have to create 2 2d arrays

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: each 2d array will have a size of 2x3

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so first of all let's create an array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: which will be of size 2x3

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: which has values 1 2 3 4 5 6

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: similarly in our second 2d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: it will also have the same values

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: or in fact let's keep different values

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: we have 7 8 9 and 10 and 11 and 12

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so let's visualize once

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: which exactly arrays we have created

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: we are trying to create our 3d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so this is our first 2d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: in which we have 3 rows

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: and we have 2 columns

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: and we have a copy of this

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: which is at the first index

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so this is our index 0

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: and this is our index 1 of our 3d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: each index has a 2d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: and what is stored in them

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: in first array we have 1 2 3 4 5 6

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: in second array we have 7 8 9 10 11 and 12

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so each individual 2d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: because it has 3 rows

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: it is 3x2 and this is also 3x2

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so overall the size of our 3d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: that is 2x3x2

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so here let's change it to 2x3x2

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: and let's also change the size to 3d

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: and let's print our 3d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: plus we are going to print the size of our array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: or we are going to print the shape

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: or we are going to print the shape

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so this is the shape

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so this is our 3d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: and the shape of it is 2x3x2

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: now if we want

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so first of all we can index our 3d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: indexing will be done in a normal way

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: let's suppose we want to find this particular element in our array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so where will this particular element exist

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: in index first of all we have to see the axis 0

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: which is which 2d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: this is 2d array 0

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so we will go inside the array at index 0

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: after that

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: inside this 2d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: this is at row 1 and column 1

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: this will be 0,1,1

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: if i print array 3d of 0,1,1

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so in this way we will get the value of 4

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: if we want we can access any other value

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: let's suppose if we want to access 9

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so for 9 the value will be array of 1,1,0

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so if i go to 1,1,0

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: the value is going to be equal to 9

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so in this way we can index our 3d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: along with indexing we can also do slicing

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: in fact slicing will be a very interesting way

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: to extract any particular row or column

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: for example in our 3d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: we want to access first row of our 2 layers

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: i.e. we want to access 1,2,7,8

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so for that we can print in array 3d

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: which layers do we want?

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: we want both layers

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so for that we have written colon

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: because we are selecting all the layers

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: along with that which rows do we want?

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: we want only 0th row here and here

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: which column do we want?

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: we want all the columns of first 0th row

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: and also all the columns of 0th row

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so we have written colon there also

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so this will get us first row from both layers

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: let's run it

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so we have got values 1,2,7,8

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so this is our one 2d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: in which 1,2 is the first row

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: this is our second 2d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: in which 7,8 is the first row

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: we have got these two values

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: similarly we can extract first column also

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: if we want the first column

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so here we will need all the rows

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: in first column if we get 1,3,5

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so for that we need only 0th column

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: and here 7,9 and 11

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: let's run

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so we have got 1,3,5 and 7,9 and 11

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: and here we can manipulate our data also

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: for example both our 2d arrays

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: i.e. in the whole 3d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: all our first rows

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: and here we want to replace all the values with 99

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: then we can do that

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: just like this

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: we can access all the rows and replace the values

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: and again when we will print our 3d array

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: it will be something like this

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: earlier here was 1,2,7,8

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: now here is 99,99

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: and here also 99,99

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: so in this way we can perform

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: many different types of useful operations

chunks.title: 3D
chunks.text: on our 3d array
